label: Product Profile
description: A vendor-focused profile examining a specific product or solution

label: Industry Analysis
description: Broad examination of industry trends and market dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
description: Analysis of competing vendors and products within a market segment

label: Field Research
description: Findings based on primary interviews with users and practitioners

label: Industry Analysis
description: Secondary analysis of market structure and trends

label: Data Warehousing
description: Technologies and practices for consolidating enterprise data for analytics

label: Decision Support
description: Systems and tools enabling analytical queries and business intelligence

label: Data Virtualization
description: Providing unified data access without physical consolidation

label: Query and Reporting
description: Tools for ad hoc querying and structured reporting against data sources

label: Vendor
description: Commercial software or technology company

label: Analyst Firm
description: Market research and technology advisory organization

label: Product
description: Named software product or solution

label: Standard
description: Technical specification or protocol

label: Active
description: Entity is currently operating under same or successor identity

label: Acquired
description: Entity was absorbed into another organization

label: Merged
description: Entity combined with another to form new organization

label: Renamed
description: Entity continues under a different name

label: Discontinued
description: Entity or product is no longer available

label: Active
description: Technology remains in current use

label: Evolved
description: Technology transformed into successor concept or product

label: Legacy
description: Technology still in use but superseded by newer approaches

label: Discontinued
description: Technology is no longer in active development or use

label: Analyst Claim
description: Forward-looking or evaluative statement by Aberdeen analyst

label: Factual Statement
description: Stated fact about a product, company, or event

label: User Feedback
description: Reported opinion or experience of product users

label: Market Observation
description: Description of market conditions or competitive dynamics

label: Product Feature
description: Description of a specific product capability

label: Pricing
description: Information about product pricing

label: Positive
description: Favorable assessment or outcome

label: Neutral
description: Non-evaluative or balanced statement

label: Negative
description: Unfavorable assessment or limitation identified

label: Strategy Classification
description: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or competitive positioning

label: Viability Prediction
description: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or market trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
description: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
description: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or competitive positioning

label: Benchmark Result
description: Quantitative performance comparison against peers or industry standards

label: Framework Factor
description: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
description: Quantitative market statistic such as revenue, share, or growth rate

label: Expert Opinion
description: Qualitative professional judgment or analytical finding

label: Document Review
description: Analysis of existing documents, reports, and published records

label: Field Research
description: Primary data collection via IS executive interviews or customer surveys

label: Industry Analysis
description: Systematic analysis of industry structure, dynamics, and competitive forces

label: Competitive Profiling
description: Detailed comparison of competing entities' strategies, products, and positions

label: Benchmarking
description: Comparison against industry standards, peers, or prior periods

label: Revenue Benchmarking
description: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total

label: High Confidence
description: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources or explicit supplier data

label: Medium Confidence
description: Reasonable basis but data is estimated or partially corroborated

label: Low Confidence
description: Directional judgment with limited evidence; Aberdeen estimate only

label: Verified
description: Confirmed by subsequent events, independent sources, or official records
